prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: seamless 2:1 equirectangular 360 panorama for a WebGL sphere. Primary request: A Sigil-inspired impossible planar city of doors at night, a circular metropolis curving overhead, infinite portals suspended in alleys, one central gate awakening with cyan machine light. Concept: the Task Node was science fiction, now the first gate opens. Scene/backdrop: dark cosmic fantasy city, brass and black stone, floating stairways, portals into data storms, no official logos or named characters. Composition: seamless equirectangular 360 environment, ultra-wide cinematic panorama, deep perspective, central glowing doorway, foreground silhouettes of abstract travelers only. Style: high-end fantasy concept art blended with cybernetic AI interfaces, dramatic, immersive, awe. Palette: black stone, cyan, red, gold, faint green. Constraints: no readable text, no logos, no watermark, no Dungeons and Dragons logo, no UI screenshots, no modern brand marks.
